Run an agent for a specific phase (used by orchestrated windows)

Usage: codexize agent-run [OPTIONS] --session-id <SESSION_ID> --phase <PHASE> --role <ROLE> [-- <COMMAND>...]

Arguments:
  [COMMAND]...  

Options:
      --session-id <SESSION_ID>  
      --phase <PHASE>            
      --role <ROLE>              
      --artifact <ARTIFACTS>     Required artifact paths — agent is blocked from stopping until all exist
  -h, --help                     Print help
